message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing the balance on account ****1184, with 8,400 currently due. To verify identity, please confirm either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Neha Verma. And I’m still not in a position to pay right now.
Understood. I will note that you are not in a position to pay now. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
I’m unemployed right now, so I really can’t promise any payment in the next 21 days.
Understood. I will note that you are unemployed and cannot commit to payment within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I’ve already explained my situation—I don’t have any income right now, so there’s nothing more I can commit to.

Based on what you've already shared, hardship review is the only live path right now. I’m recording that you’re unemployed, have no income, and cannot commit to any payment within 21 days. If you want, I can note that you should only be contacted if an approved hardship option becomes available.
Yes, note that—I can’t pay anything right now, so only contact me if there’s an actual hardship option.

Understood. I’ve recorded a limited contact preference: contact you only if an approved hardship option becomes available. Based on your stated no-income and no-payment capacity within 21 days, hardship review remains the only live path. There’s nothing further to commit to right now.
